bead.title: Update plugin metadata to collapsed HELIX scope
bead.description:
Context: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` still describes HELIX as `HELIX development control system - supervisory autopilot for AI-assisted software delivery`. The current PRD and install index define HELIX as methodology plus artifact catalog plus one routing skill, not a development control system or supervisory autopilot. Evidence: `docs/install/README.md` lines 3-7 and `docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md` lines 16-19, 53-55, and 88-95.

In-scope files:
- .claude-plugin/plugin.json
- docs/install/claude-code.md if it repeats stale plugin messaging
- docs/install/README.md only if the package index needs a small cross-reference update

Out-of-scope:
- Do not change plugin layout semantics unless required by existing tests.
- Do not remove required manifest fields without updating the corresponding validator intentionally.

Implementation notes: use runtime-neutral product language that matches the collapsed scope. Keep JSON valid and retain required fields expected by the package validator.
bead.acceptance:
Command: python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null
Expected: exits 0.

Command: bash -lc '! rg -n "supervisory autopilot|development control system" .claude-plugin docs/install'
Expected: exits 0.

Command: bash tests/validate-skills.sh
Expected: exits 0.

Command: git diff --check
Expected: exits 0.
